tasks.title: Create Spring Boot backend skeleton
tasks.description: Create permission-system-backend with Maven, Spring Boot 3.x, JDK 17, main class com.example.permission.PermissionApplication, application.yml, application-dev.yml, actuator health, and dependencies for web, security, validation, mybatis-plus, mysql, redis, jwt, knife4j, and lombok.
acceptance: permission-system-backend/pom.xml declares JDK 17 and required dependencies
PermissionApplication starts a Spring Boot app
application-dev.yml includes port 8080, MySQL, Redis, and JWT placeholders
Maven compile passes

tasks.title: Implement common backend components
tasks.description: Implement Result<T>, PageResult<T>, ErrorCode, BusinessException, UnauthorizedException, GlobalExceptionHandler, DateUtils, SecurityUtils, and TreeUtils under com.example.permission.common.
acceptance: Result has code, message, and data
PageResult has list, total, pageNo, and pageSize
GlobalExceptionHandler covers validation, 401, 403, business, and system errors
Maven tests pass

tasks.title: Configure MyBatis Plus, Redis, Security, and OpenAPI
tasks.description: Implement MybatisPlusConfig, RedisConfig, SecurityConfig, WebMvcConfig, and OpenApiConfig. Allow /auth/login, /auth/captcha, /auth/refresh, /actuator/health, /v3/api-docs/**, and /swagger-ui/**. Require authentication for admin APIs.
acceptance: Configuration classes load in Spring context
SecurityFilterChain uses Spring Security 6 style APIs
RedisTemplate uses String keys and JSON values
Maven tests pass

tasks.title: Write MySQL init DDL and seed permissions
tasks.description: Create src/main/resources/db/init.sql with sys_user, sys_role, sys_user_role, sys_menu, sys_role_menu, sys_dept, sys_role_data_scope, sys_operation_log, and sys_login_log. Seed admin, system_manager, audit_manager, normal_user, menu nodes, and button permission codes.
acceptance: Nine sys_* tables exist in init.sql
Initial roles and core permission codes are seeded
Admin password seed is documented as BCrypt ciphertext
Maven compile passes
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS table_count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'permission_system' AND table_name LIKE 'sys_%'

tasks.title: Create Vue 3 frontend skeleton
tasks.description: Create permission-system-web with Vite, Vue 3, TypeScript, Element Plus, Vue Router, Pinia, Axios, SCSS, and @playwright/test. Configure Vite port 5173 and /api proxy to http://localhost:8080.
acceptance: package.json includes dev, build, and test:e2e scripts
Vite uses port 5173
Element Plus, Pinia, and Router are registered
Frontend build passes

tasks.title: Implement system entities, mappers, DTOs, and VOs
tasks.description: Implement UserDO, RoleDO, UserRoleDO, MenuDO, RoleMenuDO, DeptDO, RoleDataScopeDO, OperationLogDO, LoginLogDO, mapper interfaces, create/update/page request DTOs, and response VOs for the system module.
acceptance: Entity fields match init.sql
Mapper, DTO, and VO classes compile
Page request DTOs include pageNo and pageSize
Maven tests pass

tasks.title: Implement JWT session and permission services
tasks.description: Implement LoginUser, JwtTokenService, JwtAuthenticationFilter, SecurityUserDetailsService, and PermissionService. Use Redis keys login:token:{accessToken}, login:refresh:{refreshToken}, permission:user:{userId}, and online:user:{userId}. PermissionService.has supports superAdmin and *:*:*.
acceptance: Bearer token builds Spring Security authentication
PermissionService handles super admin and normal permission sets
Redis key names match architecture.md
Maven tests pass

tasks.title: Implement AuthController APIs
tasks.description: Implement AuthController, AuthService, and CaptchaService for POST /auth/login, POST /auth/logout, POST /auth/refresh, GET /auth/me, and GET /auth/captcha. Login validates username, password, captchaKey, captchaCode, writes sys_login_log, and returns accessToken, refreshToken, and expiresIn.
acceptance: Five auth APIs return Result structures
Login failure uses a generic account or password error
/auth/me returns user, roles, menus, and permissions
Actuator health returns 200 after service start
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_login_log

tasks.title: Implement data scope annotation and aspect
tasks.description: Implement DataScope, DataScopeAspect, DataScopeContext, DataScopeType, and DataScopeService. Support ALL, DEPT_ONLY, DEPT_AND_CHILD, SELF, and CUSTOM_DEPT, with max-scope or custom-department union logic for multi-role users.
acceptance: DataScope exposes deptAlias and userAlias
DataScopeService computes all five scope types
DataScopeContext uses ThreadLocal and clears in finally
Maven tests pass

tasks.title: Implement operation log annotation and audit service
tasks.description: Implement OperationLog, OperationLogAspect, and LogService. Persist module, operation, requestMethod, requestUri, requestParams, responseResult, userId, username, ip, userAgent, status, errorMessage, costTime, and createTime to sys_operation_log. Mask password fields.
acceptance: OperationLog can annotate controller methods
Success and exception cases create audit records
password is not stored in requestParams
Maven tests pass
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_operation_log

tasks.title: Implement user CRUD APIs
tasks.description: Implement UserController, UserService, and UserServiceImpl for GET /system/users, GET /system/users/{id}, POST /system/users, PUT /system/users/{id}, and DELETE /system/users. Support username, mobile, status, and deptId filters. Add system:user:list/query/add/edit/delete permission checks.
acceptance: Five user CRUD APIs exist with @PreAuthorize
Page query applies @DataScope
New user password is BCrypt encoded
Create, update, and delete write OperationLog records
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0

tasks.title: Implement user advanced action APIs
tasks.description: Add PUT /system/users/{id}/status, PUT /system/users/{id}/password, PUT /system/users/{id}/roles, and export service logic. Disable user clears login and permission cache. Assign role updates sys_user_role and clears permission:user:{userId}.
acceptance: Status, reset password, and assign role APIs exist with permission codes
Role assignment is transactional
Disable and role assignment clear Redis permission caches
Maven tests pass
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_user_role

tasks.title: Implement role CRUD APIs
tasks.description: Implement RoleController, RoleService, and RoleServiceImpl for GET /system/roles, GET /system/roles/{id}, POST /system/roles, PUT /system/roles/{id}, DELETE /system/roles, and PUT /system/roles/{id}/status. Validate unique roleCode and prevent deleting roles bound to users.
acceptance: Role CRUD and status APIs exist with permission codes
Delete checks sys_user_role references
roleCode uniqueness is enforced
Role changes write OperationLog records
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0

tasks.title: Implement role permission and data-scope APIs
tasks.description: Add GET /system/roles/{id}/permissions, PUT /system/roles/{id}/permissions, and PUT /system/roles/{id}/data-scope. Maintain sys_role_menu and sys_role_data_scope. Clear permission:user:{userId} for all users bound to the changed role.
acceptance: Role permission APIs save and read menu and button IDs
Role data scope supports five scope types
Permission changes clear affected user permission caches
Maven tests pass
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_role_menu

tasks.title: Implement menu and button permission APIs
tasks.description: Implement MenuController, MenuService, and MenuServiceImpl for GET /system/menus/tree, GET /system/menus/{id}, POST /system/menus, PUT /system/menus/{id}, and DELETE /system/menus. Support CATALOG, MENU, and BUTTON. Validate unique permissionCode for BUTTON nodes.
acceptance: Menu tree is sorted by parentId and sort
CATALOG, MENU, and BUTTON validation follows the requirements
Delete checks child nodes and sys_role_menu references
Maven tests pass
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0

tasks.title: Implement department APIs
tasks.description: Implement DeptController, DeptService, and DeptServiceImpl for GET /system/depts/tree, GET /system/depts/{id}, POST /system/depts, PUT /system/depts/{id}, and DELETE /system/depts. Use tree structure and block delete when child departments or users exist.
acceptance: Department tree is sorted by parentId and sort
Delete checks child departments and sys_user references
Disabled departments cannot be selected for new users
Maven tests pass
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0

tasks.title: Implement login and operation log APIs
tasks.description: Implement LogController for GET /system/logs/login, GET /system/logs/operation, DELETE /system/logs/login, and DELETE /system/logs/operation. Support filters for username, status, module, operation, and time ranges. Apply @DataScope where appropriate.
acceptance: Login and operation logs can be queried with pagination
Cleanup APIs have permission codes and audit logging
Filters match backend DTO fields
Maven tests pass
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_login_log

tasks.title: Add backend core unit tests
tasks.description: Add tests for AuthService, PermissionService, UserService, RoleService, MenuService, DeptService, DataScopeService, and OperationLogAspect. Cover login success/failure, 403, super admin, permission cache invalidation, data scope, and association checks.
acceptance: Core service tests cover happy and error paths
PermissionService.has covers *:*:* and normal permissions
DataScopeService covers all five data scopes
Maven tests pass

tasks.title: Implement frontend request, auth, and permission state
tasks.description: Implement utils/request.ts, utils/auth.ts, utils/storage.ts, api/auth.ts, store/modules/user.ts, and store/modules/permission.ts. Axios adds Bearer token, handles 401 refresh and 403 messages. Permission state includes menus, permissions, roles, and dynamicRoutesLoaded.
acceptance: Axios attaches Authorization
401 attempts refresh token then redirects to login on failure
Pinia user and permission states are typed
Frontend build passes

tasks.title: Implement dynamic routes and route guard
tasks.description: Implement router/routes.ts, router/permission.ts, and menu-to-route conversion. Convert backend menu nodes to Vue Router records. Guard redirects unauthenticated users to /login and loads /auth/me when dynamicRoutesLoaded is false.
acceptance: Dynamic routes reload after page refresh
Unauthenticated admin routes redirect to login
Route meta includes title and permission
Frontend build passes

tasks.title: Implement admin layout and navigation
tasks.description: Implement BasicLayout.vue, Sidebar.vue, Header.vue, TabsView.vue, and dashboard view. Sidebar renders menus from permission store. Header shows current user and logout. Use dense, work-focused admin styling.
acceptance: Main layout renders sidebar, header, tabs, and content
Logout calls POST /auth/logout and clears state
Sidebar uses dynamic menus
Frontend build passes

tasks.title: Implement frontend button permission directive and components
tasks.description: Implement directives/permission.ts, PermissionGate, PermissionButton, and utils/permission.ts. v-permission and permission components share permissionStore.hasPermission. PermissionButton wraps Element Plus button props and icon support.
acceptance: v-permission, PermissionGate, and PermissionButton use one permission check
Unauthorized buttons are hidden or not rendered
*:*:* allows all buttons
Frontend build passes

tasks.title: Implement login page and auth flow
tasks.description: Implement views/login/index.vue. Form fields: username, password, captchaKey, captchaCode. Call GET /auth/captcha, POST /auth/login, save tokens, call GET /auth/me, load menus and permissions, and redirect to dashboard.
acceptance: Login form validates username, password, and captcha
Successful login saves accessToken and refreshToken
Successful login loads /auth/me and dynamic routes
Frontend build passes
tasks.e2e_playwright: cd permission-system-web && npx playwright test tests/e2e/login.spec.ts --reporter=list

tasks.title: Implement user management page
tasks.description: Implement views/system/user/index.vue, api/user.ts, DeptTreeSelect, and CrudTable. Include filters for username, mobile, status, and dept; department tree; user table; create/edit dialog; reset password; assign role; export. Button permissions use system:user:* codes.
acceptance: User page supports paginated query and department filter
Action buttons are permission controlled
Create and edit forms align with backend DTOs
Frontend build passes
tasks.e2e_playwright: cd permission-system-web && npx playwright test tests/e2e/user.spec.ts --reporter=list

tasks.title: Implement role management page
tasks.description: Implement views/system/role/index.vue, api/role.ts, RolePermissionTree, and DataScopeEditor. Include role query/list, create/edit dialog, permission assignment dialog, and data scope dialog. Permission tree displays CATALOG, MENU, and BUTTON nodes.
acceptance: Role CRUD form and API wrappers are complete
Permission tree saves menu and button IDs
DataScopeEditor supports five scope types
Frontend build passes
tasks.e2e_playwright: cd permission-system-web && npx playwright test tests/e2e/role.spec.ts --reporter=list

tasks.title: Implement menu management page
tasks.description: Implement views/system/menu/index.vue and api/menu.ts. Use a tree table. Support add catalog, add menu, add button, edit node, and delete node. Dynamic fields vary by CATALOG, MENU, and BUTTON type.
acceptance: Tree table displays CATALOG, MENU, and BUTTON
Form fields switch by menu type
Delete confirms and calls DELETE /system/menus/{id}
Frontend build passes
tasks.e2e_playwright: cd permission-system-web && npx playwright test tests/e2e/menu.spec.ts --reporter=list

tasks.title: Implement department management page
tasks.description: Implement views/system/dept/index.vue and api/dept.ts. Use a tree table for departments. Support create, edit, delete, enable, disable, sort update, and leader fields. Show backend error when child departments or users block delete.
acceptance: Department table displays parentId hierarchy
Form includes name, leader, phone, email, sort, and status
Delete and disable operations have confirmation
Frontend build passes
tasks.e2e_playwright: cd permission-system-web && npx playwright test tests/e2e/dept.spec.ts --reporter=list

tasks.title: Implement log management pages
tasks.description: Implement views/system/log/login.vue, views/system/log/operation.vue, and api/log.ts. Login log shows username, ip, userAgent, status, message, and loginTime. Operation log shows module, operation, method, URI, username, status, costTime, and createTime.
acceptance: Login and operation log pages support pagination
Filters align with backend query DTOs
Cleanup buttons use system:log permissions
Frontend build passes
tasks.e2e_playwright: cd permission-system-web && npx playwright test tests/e2e/log.spec.ts --reporter=list

tasks.title: Write backend RBAC API E2E tests
tasks.description: Create tests/e2e/test_rbac_api.ps1. Flow: get captcha, admin login, call /auth/me, create test role, assign menu/button permissions, create test user, assign role, login as test user, verify allowed API returns 200 and forbidden API returns 403.
acceptance: test_rbac_api.ps1 is executable
Test covers login, /auth/me, role grants, user role assignment, and 403
Test data uses test_ prefix and avoids destructive cleanup
API E2E passes
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_operation_log

tasks.title: Write frontend permission Playwright tests
tasks.description: Create permission-system-web/tests/e2e/auth-permission.spec.ts. Flow: visit /login, login as admin, verify system menu, simulate or login limited user, verify unauthorized buttons are hidden, refresh page, and verify dynamic routes and permissions recover.
acceptance: Playwright test covers login, menus, buttons, and refresh recovery
baseURL is http://localhost:5173
Failures produce screenshots or test artifacts
Playwright test passes
tasks.e2e_playwright: cd permission-system-web && npx playwright test tests/e2e/auth-permission.spec.ts --reporter=list

tasks.title: Complete full acceptance E2E suite
tasks.description: Create tests/e2e/test_acceptance.ps1 and permission-system-web/tests/e2e/full.spec.ts. Cover login, logout, refresh token, role-specific menus, button hiding, direct forbidden API returns 403, permission cache refresh after role change, data scope filtering, CRUD pages, audit logs, and route recovery after refresh.
acceptance: Full API script and Playwright test exist
All acceptance criteria have assertions or automated checks
Failure logs identify the API or page
Backend tests, frontend build, API E2E, and Playwright pass
tasks.e2e_playwright: cd permission-system-web && npx playwright test tests/e2e/full.spec.ts --reporter=list
tasks.e2e_db_verify: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sys_operation_log
